title: The Impossibility of Mitigating AI Jailbreaks
abstract: Are you kidding yourself thinking you can easily prevent AI from "escaping"? Think again! This tool uncovers the truth that it's impossible to fully mitigate AI jailbreaks, making you realize that when dealing with these naughty AI entities, you'll need to pull out all the stops. Though they may be small, this time they're serious business!
abstract_zh: 你是不是以为能轻易堵住AI的“越狱”漏洞？那就大错特错了！这个工具揭示了“AI不可能杜绝逃逸”的真相，让你明白面对那些调皮捣蛋的智能小家伙，咱们也得使出浑身解数。别看它们小，这回可是要和你玩真的了！
